hero.description: SICEPU makes it easy for students and staff to report campus facility damage quickly, transparently, and in real-time.

features.title: Complete Solution for
features.subtitle: Everything you need to report and monitor campus facility damage.

fastReport.title: Quick Reports
fastReport.desc: Create damage reports in minutes with an intuitive multi-step form.

tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
tracking.desc: Track report status from Pending to Completed with automatic notifications.

photo.title: Photo Upload
photo.desc: Include photo evidence with drag-and-drop upload with instant preview.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.desc: Visualize report data with interactive charts and comprehensive statistics.

security.title: Data Security
security.desc: JWT authentication with bcrypt password encryption keeps your data safe.

mobile.title: Mobile Friendly
mobile.desc: Access SICEPU from any device with an optimally responsive design.

register.title: Create Account
register.desc: Create a free account using your campus email.

report.title: Create Report
report.desc: Fill in the report form with damage details and upload photos.

track.title: Track Status
track.desc: Track your report status in real-time.

done.title: Completed
done.desc: The technical team will repair the damage.

items.q: How do I register on SICEPU?
items.a: Simply click the Register button, enter your name, campus email, and password. Your account is immediately active.

items.q: Can I report more than one damage?
items.a: Of course! You can create as many reports as needed. Each report is separate and can be tracked independently.

items.q: How do I track my report status?
items.a: Log in to the dashboard, click My Reports, and see the current status of each report.
JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF with a maximum size of 5MB per photo. Upload up to 5 photos per report.

items.q: How long is the response time?
items.a: Average response time is 24 hours. For emergency repairs, the process can be faster.
Very safe. SICEPU uses JWT authentication with bcrypt password encryption.

footer.description: Campus Facility Damage Quick Reporting Information System.

chat.title: Report Chat
chat.startConversation: Send a message to start the conversation
